center.name: 奧利諾科盆地
center.summary: 奧利諾科盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括麝雉、Fiery-capped manakin、Ringed antpipit，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Venezuela in the Orinoco Basin on the lower the Caura River and the middle Paragua River in Bolívar; there is also a sight record in northwestern Amazonas.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ringed antpipit is primarily a bird of the Amazon Basin and also occurs in the Orinoco Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The hoatzin ( ) or hoactzin ( ) (Opisthocomus hoazin) is a species of tropical bird found in swamps, riparian forests, and mangroves of the Amazon and Orinoco Basins in South America
